description: Deterministic documentation generator for TypeScript packages.

exports.name: defineParadoxConfig
exports.description: Defines a Paradox configuration object without changing its shape.

exports.name: getParadoxDocTag
exports.description: Looks up documentation tag metadata by tag name.

signatures.label: (name: string) => { readonly name: "readme"; readonly syntax: "@readme"; readonly description: "Includes a documentation block or exported symbol in README output."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["block", "symbol"]; readonly repeatable: false; readonly handler: "markReadme"; } | { readonly name: "config"; readonly syntax: "@config"; readonly description: "Marks a type or interface as part of the Paradox configuration model. @config alone does not imply README inclusion; use @config plus @readme for README output."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["interface", "type"]; readonly repeatable: false; readonly handler: "markConfig"; } | { readonly name: "example"; readonly syntax: "@example"; readonly description: "Adds a titled fenced code example to the generated documentation for a symbol."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["symbol"]; readonly repeatable: true; readonly handler: "parseExample"; } | null
signatures.returnType: { readonly name: "readme"; readonly syntax: "@readme"; readonly description: "Includes a documentation block or exported symbol in README output."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["block", "symbol"]; readonly repeatable: false; readonly handler: "markReadme"; } | { readonly name: "config"; readonly syntax: "@config"; readonly description: "Marks a type or interface as part of the Paradox configuration model. @config alone does not imply README inclusion; use @config plus @readme for README output."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["interface", "type"]; readonly repeatable: false; readonly handler: "markConfig"; } | { readonly name: "example"; readonly syntax: "@example"; readonly description: "Adds a titled fenced code example to the generated documentation for a symbol."; readonly appliesTo: readonly ["symbol"]; readonly repeatable: true; readonly handler: "parseExample"; } | null

exports.name: isParadoxDocTagName
exports.description: Checks whether a string is a supported Paradox documentation tag name.

exports.name: PARADOX_DOC_TAGS
exports.description:
Supported Paradox documentation tags.

Paradox supports doc tags inside triple-star documentation comments.

values.name: readme
values.description: Includes a documentation block or exported symbol in README output.

values.name: config
values.description: Marks a type or interface as part of the Paradox configuration model. @config alone does not imply README inclusion; use @config plus @readme for README output.

values.name: example
values.description: Adds a titled fenced code example to the generated documentation for a symbol.

sourceFunctions.name: analyze
sourceFunctions.description: Analyzes a package and returns the complete documentation input model.

sourceFunctions.name: mapTypeMembers
sourceFunctions.description: Converts semantic type members into serializable analysis output.

sourceFunctions.name: readPackageJson
sourceFunctions.description: Reads package metadata from the analyzed package root.

sourceFunctions.name: analyzeBadges
sourceFunctions.description: Derives deterministic repository metadata badges from local repository files.

sourceFunctions.name: hasAnyFile
sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether any candidate file exists under the repository root.

sourceFunctions.description: Reads tsconfig metadata and detects strict TypeScript mode.

sourceFunctions.name: readCoveragePercent
sourceFunctions.description: Reads the line coverage percentage from a coverage summary file when present.

sourceFunctions.name: formatPercent
sourceFunctions.description: Formats integer and fractional percentages for badge labels.

sourceFunctions.name: getCoverageColor
sourceFunctions.description: Selects the coverage badge color from the coverage percentage.

sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether a named package script is configured.

sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether any workflow file invokes a named package script.

sourceFunctions.name: escapeRegExp
sourceFunctions.description: Escapes regular expression syntax in a script name.

sourceFunctions.description: Reads all GitHub Actions workflow files from the repository.

sourceFunctions.name: readDirectory
sourceFunctions.description: Reads a directory and treats a missing path as an empty directory.

sourceFunctions.name: isNotFoundError
sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether an unknown error is a file-not-found filesystem error.

sourceFunctions.name: readJsonFile
sourceFunctions.description: Reads and parses a JSON file, returning null when the file does not exist.

sourceFunctions.name: fileExists
sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether a filesystem path exists.

sourceFunctions.name: sortBadges
sourceFunctions.description: Sorts badges into the stable preferred display order.

sourceFunctions.name: getBadgeOrder
sourceFunctions.description: Returns the configured display order index for a badge id.

sourceFunctions.name: analyzeComponents
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts React components and their props from analyzed exports.

sourceFunctions.name: analyzeExports
sourceFunctions.description: Collects exported declarations from configured package entrypoints.

sourceFunctions.name: getEntryPointSourceFiles
sourceFunctions.description: Resolves configured entrypoint paths to source files in the TypeScript project.

sourceFunctions.name: getFirstDeclaration
sourceFunctions.description: Returns the first declaration for a symbol, or null when none exists.

sourceFunctions.name: inferKind
sourceFunctions.description: Infers the public export kind from the declaration shape.

sourceFunctions.name: uniqueSorted
sourceFunctions.description: Returns unique string values sorted for deterministic generated output.

sourceFunctions.name: toPosixPath
sourceFunctions.description: Normalizes platform-specific path separators for generated documentation output.

sourceFunctions.name: createEmptyMetadata
sourceFunctions.description: Creates empty documentation metadata for exports without Paradox comments.

sourceFunctions.name: analyzeModules
sourceFunctions.description: Builds a deterministic module relationship graph for documentation renderers.

sourceFunctions.name: uniqueSorted
sourceFunctions.description: Returns unique string values sorted for deterministic generated output.

sourceFunctions.name: toPosixPath
sourceFunctions.description: Normalizes platform-specific path separators for generated documentation output.

sourceFunctions.name: createProject
sourceFunctions.description: Creates the ts-morph project used by the analyzer.

sourceFunctions.description: Runs the semantic analyzer pipeline for a project.

sourceFunctions.name: associateDocBlocksWithSymbols

sourceFunctions.name: collectDocBlocks
sourceFunctions.description: Collects all Paradox doc blocks from a source file.

sourceFunctions.name: collectTags
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts registered tags from a doc block.

sourceFunctions.name: collectExports
sourceFunctions.description: Collects exported declarations from configured entrypoints.

sourceFunctions.name: detectExportKind

sourceFunctions.name: resolveTypeReference
sourceFunctions.description: Resolves a named type reference from a node or symbol.

sourceFunctions.name: collectTypeMembers
sourceFunctions.description: Collects nested type members for interfaces and type literals.

sourceFunctions.name: collectPropsForExport
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts props metadata for a callable export.

sourceFunctions.name: collectDefaultValuesFromBinding
sourceFunctions.description: Collects default values from destructured bindings.

sourceFunctions.name: collectRelatedTypes
sourceFunctions.description: Collects related types referenced by an export.

sourceFunctions.name: collectImportGraph
sourceFunctions.description: Collects local import relationships between source files.

sourceFunctions.name: collectCallGraph
sourceFunctions.description: Collects call relationships between local symbols.

sourceFunctions.name: collectComponentCompositionGraph
sourceFunctions.description: Collects component composition edges for React components.

sourceFunctions.description: Detects simple React component declarations by name and return type.

sourceFunctions.name: getParadoxComment
sourceFunctions.description: Reads the nearest Paradox doc comment attached to a declaration.

sourceFunctions.name: parseParadoxComment

sourceFunctions.description: Collects callable declarations from analyzed source files for source-area documentation.

sourceFunctions.description: Converts a callable declaration into source documentation metadata.

sourceFunctions.name: toPosixPath
sourceFunctions.description: Normalizes platform-specific path separators for generated documentation output.

sourceFunctions.name: createUsageFromPackageJson
sourceFunctions.description: Builds installation and executable usage commands from package metadata.

sourceFunctions.description: Extracts the unscoped package name from a package id.

sourceFunctions.name: getComponentPropsType

sourceFunctions.name: getExportMetadata

sourceFunctions.description: Resolves the source location for a declaration relative to the package root.

sourceFunctions.name: getSignatures
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts callable signatures for exported functions and callable values.

sourceFunctions.name: getSignature
sourceFunctions.description: Builds one normalized call signature from a callable declaration.

sourceFunctions.name: getMembers
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts members for interface and type literal exports.

sourceFunctions.name: getMembersFromProperties
sourceFunctions.description: Converts TypeScript properties into documented member metadata.

sourceFunctions.name: getStructuredRows
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts table-like rows from exported const arrays of object literals.

sourceFunctions.description: Resolves const assertions and returns the array literal used for structured docs.

sourceFunctions.name: getVariableDeclaration
sourceFunctions.description: Resolves a variable declaration from declaration nodes used by export symbols.

sourceFunctions.name: getObjectLiteralValues
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts primitive and string-array values from one object literal.

sourceFunctions.name: getLiteralValue
sourceFunctions.description: Converts supported literal expressions into displayable string values.

sourceFunctions.name: getFirstDeclaration

sourceFunctions.name: isMemberMethodDeclaration

sourceFunctions.name: readParadoxMetadata
sourceFunctions.description: Reads Paradox comment metadata from a declaration.

sourceFunctions.name: toPosixPath
sourceFunctions.description: Normalizes platform-specific path separators for generated documentation output.

sourceFunctions.description: Returns declaration positions that may own a leading Paradox comment.

sourceFunctions.name: readCommentBefore
sourceFunctions.description: Reads a Paradox doc comment directly before a target position.

sourceFunctions.name: getPropsFromType
sourceFunctions.description: Extracts prop names, types, required flags, and descriptions from a type.

sourceFunctions.name: isReactComponent
sourceFunctions.description: Detects simple React component declarations by name and return type.

sourceFunctions.name: main
sourceFunctions.description:
Runs the Paradox CLI.

The command discovers the nearest Paradox config, resolves the package and output roots,
analyzes the package, builds the documentation model, renders all documentation artifacts,
and writes them to the configured output directory.

sourceFunctions.name: defineParadoxConfig
sourceFunctions.description: Defines a Paradox configuration object without changing its shape.

sourceFunctions.name: getParadoxDocTag
sourceFunctions.description: Looks up documentation tag metadata by tag name.

sourceFunctions.name: isParadoxDocTagName
sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether a string is a supported Paradox documentation tag name.

sourceFunctions.name: buildModel
sourceFunctions.description: Converts analysis output into a serializable documentation model.

sourceFunctions.name: mapExport
sourceFunctions.description: Maps one analyzed export into the serializable documentation shape.

sourceFunctions.name: mapComponent
sourceFunctions.description: Maps an analyzed component while preserving export metadata when available.

sourceFunctions.name: findConfigFactoryName
sourceFunctions.description: Finds the conventional config factory export for a config type when present.

sourceFunctions.name: getDefaultConfigFileName
sourceFunctions.description: Derives the default config file name from a package id.

sourceFunctions.name: sortByName
sourceFunctions.description: Returns a copy of items sorted by their `name` property.

sourceFunctions.name: findParadoxConfigFile
sourceFunctions.description: Searches upward from a start directory until it finds a supported Paradox config file.

sourceFunctions.name: loadParadoxConfig
sourceFunctions.description: Loads a Paradox config module and returns its default export or an empty config.

sourceFunctions.name: resolvePackageRoot
sourceFunctions.description: Resolves and validates the package root from config and config directory.

sourceFunctions.name: resolveOutputRoot
sourceFunctions.description: Resolves the configured output directory and enforces that it stays inside the package root.

sourceFunctions.name: pathExists
sourceFunctions.description: Checks whether a filesystem path can be accessed.

sourceFunctions.name: assertPathExists
sourceFunctions.description: Throws a supplied error message when a required path does not exist.

sourceFunctions.name: validateOutputDir
sourceFunctions.description: Validates an output directory string before resolving it against the package root.

sourceFunctions.name: splitPathSegments
sourceFunctions.description: Splits a configured path into normalized non-empty path segments.

sourceFunctions.name: assertWithinRoot
sourceFunctions.description: Throws when a resolved path is outside the expected package root.

sourceFunctions.name: render
sourceFunctions.description: Renders the documentation model into README and artifact files.

sourceFunctions.name: renderBadgeArtifacts
sourceFunctions.description: Renders deterministic local SVG badges for repository metadata.

sourceFunctions.name: renderDiagramArtifacts
sourceFunctions.description: Generates deterministic Mermaid diagrams for the documentation app.

sourceFunctions.name: renderHtml
sourceFunctions.description: Renders a deterministic static HTML documentation app.

sourceFunctions.name: renderHomeView
sourceFunctions.description: Renders the Home view that keeps public API and package-level information together.

sourceFunctions.name: renderCliPanel
sourceFunctions.description: Renders the Home CLI chapter for detected bin scenarios.

sourceFunctions.name: renderSourceNavItem
sourceFunctions.description: Renders one source file entry in the left navigation.

sourceFunctions.name: renderSourceAreaView
sourceFunctions.description: Renders the right-hand source area view for a selected file.

sourceFunctions.name: renderSourceFunctionCard
sourceFunctions.description: Renders one source function card in a source-area view.

sourceFunctions.name: getSourceAreas
sourceFunctions.description: Groups analyzed source functions by their source file path.

sourceFunctions.name: getReadmeCliScenarios
sourceFunctions.description: Selects bin scenarios that should be shown on the Home page.

sourceFunctions.name: findScenarioDiagram
sourceFunctions.description: Finds the generated Mermaid artifact for a sequence scenario.

sourceFunctions.name: renderModuleCard
sourceFunctions.description: Renders module metadata on the Home page.

sourceFunctions.name: renderExportCard
sourceFunctions.description: Renders one public API export card on the Home page.

sourceFunctions.name: renderSignatureBlock
sourceFunctions.description: Renders all call signatures for a public API export.

sourceFunctions.name: renderMemberTable
sourceFunctions.description: Renders the members table for a type-like public API export.

sourceFunctions.name: renderComponentCard
sourceFunctions.description: Renders one detected component card on the Home page.

sourceFunctions.name: renderDiagramCard
sourceFunctions.description: Renders one Mermaid diagram card.

sourceFunctions.name: renderInlineCodeList
sourceFunctions.description: Renders an inline comma-separated list of code values.

sourceFunctions.name: renderChipList
sourceFunctions.description: Renders a compact chip list for related symbols.

sourceFunctions.name: groupBy
sourceFunctions.description: Groups items by a string key and returns deterministic key order.

sourceFunctions.name: toAnchorId
sourceFunctions.description: Converts a label to a stable HTML anchor id fragment.

sourceFunctions.name: toFileStem
sourceFunctions.description: Converts a scenario name to the generated Mermaid file stem.

sourceFunctions.name: escapeHtml
sourceFunctions.description: Escapes user-controlled text for safe HTML rendering.

sourceFunctions.name: escapeAttribute
sourceFunctions.description: Escapes text for use inside HTML attribute values.

sourceFunctions.name: renderMarkdown
sourceFunctions.description: Renders markdown artifacts from the documentation model.

sourceFunctions.name: write
sourceFunctions.description: Writes generated documentation artifacts to the configured output paths.

sequenceScenarios.name: paradox
sequenceScenarios.description:
Runs the Paradox CLI.

The command discovers the nearest Paradox config, resolves the package and output roots,
analyzes the package, builds the documentation model, renders all documentation artifacts,
and writes them to the configured output directory.
